ocr_findings.description: Ruby annotation above 'SLM' rendered as 'エスエルエル' in OCR (line 17); image clearly shows 'エスエルエム' (ム not ル at end). Character-level kana substitution.
Ruby phonetic annotation 'ピーディーシーエー' above 'PDCA' in body text is absent from OCR. Minor cosmetic omission.

reviewer_notes: Page is Lesson 08-02 on SLM and availability management. Main body text, PDCA table, and introductory paragraph are all faithfully captured. The table (SLMとPDCAの関係) is correctly formatted with 4 rows. The one meaningful error is the ruby kana typo エスエルエル vs エスエルエム; all substantive content is present.
